rationale: The citing paper mentions Bradlow, Hu, and Ho (2004) in the literature review as evidence that partial-profile conjoint setups can distort attribute importance depending on which attributes are shown. This citation helps justify why the authors exclude partial-profile choice-based approaches from their comparison, but it is a brief background use within a grouped discussion of prior work. The citing study does not build on, apply, or test the cited paper's learning-based imputation model, nor does it engage its mechanism in the empirical analyses.
